name: Drew Brees
title: Former NFL Quarterback
bio: American former professional football quarterback who spent the majority of his career with the New Orleans Saints. Super Bowl XLIV champion and one of the most prolific passers in NFL history.
faith: A committed Christian who has been vocal about his faith. He has appeared in Christian media, participated in 'Focus on the Family' events, and credited God with his recovery from a career-threatening shoulder injury.

sources.title: Drew Brees — Wikipedia
sources.note: Biography of the Super Bowl champion quarterback

sources.title: Drew Brees — Christian Faith and Football
sources.note: Brees discussing his faith in various interviews

tagline: Led the Saints to a Super Bowl and led many to faith
